# PHLivePhotoEditingErrorCode

**Enumeration**

Error codes for Live Photo editing errors.

## Declaration

```swift
enum PHLivePhotoEditingErrorCode
```

## Overview

These error codes appear for errors in the completion handlers of the [doc://com.apple.photokit/documentation/Photos/PHLivePhotoEditingContext/init(livePhotoEditingInput:)] and [doc://com.apple.photokit/documentation/Photos/PHLivePhotoEditingContext/saveLivePhoto(to:options:completionHandler:)] methods.

## Constants

- **PHLivePhotoEditingErrorCode.unknown**: No further information is available about the cause of the error.
- **PHLivePhotoEditingErrorCode.aborted**: Live Photo processing was canceled by the Processing an Editing Context’s Live Photo method.

## Initializers

- **init(rawValue:)**

## Errors

- **PHLivePhotoEditingErrorDomain**: The domain value for error objects produced by a Live Photo editing context.

## Conforms To

- BitwiseCopyable
- Equatable
- Hashable
- RawRepresentable
- Sendable
- SendableMetatype
